productDisplayName: Numero Uno Men's White Dunk Shoe
description: The simple design of these numero uno shoes have an understated elegance. The sturdy yet comfortable design takes you through the day in style. These preppy shoes look good when teamed up with jeans and polo neck tees for casual outings.Upper Synthetic leather uppers for protection and durability Lace-ups for snug Fit Cushioned collar and lightly padded tongue for greater comfort Design detailing done with horizontal strips over the forefoot and midfoot Logo name on the tongue and embossed logo name on the heel collar Midsole Cushioned insole for all day comfort Outsole Rubber outsole with diamond pattern grooves for durability and traction shoe careRub surface with soft, clean, damp cloth to remove dustDo not machine wash
